tools.name: sfdt_preflight
tools.description: Run sfdt pre-deployment validation checks (git clean state, branch naming rules, Apex test runs, coverage threshold checks, etc.). Useful before validation or deployment.

tools.name: sfdt_drift
tools.description: Run metadata drift detection between a target Salesforce org and local source directories.

tools.name: sfdt_compare
tools.description: Compare metadata between two orgs, or between local source and an org. Returns compare results.

tools.name: sfdt_quality
tools.description: Analyze Apex test quality, generate IsTest boilerplate stubs, or generate a fix-plan for coverage gaps.

tools.name: sfdt_logs
tools.description: Retrieve the latest structured or raw execution logs for DevOps actions.

tools.name: sfdt_manifest_from_git
tools.description: Generate package.xml and destructiveChanges.xml manifests using Git diff analysis.

tools.name: sfdt_validate
tools.description: Perform a deployment validation dry-run on Salesforce without committing changes.

tools.name: sfdt_deploy
tools.description: Perform a metadata deployment to a target Salesforce org. Supports a smart delta mode (only git-changed metadata with smart test selection). Potentially destructive.

tools.name: sfdt_quick_deploy
tools.description: Quick deploy a previously validated metadata validation job using validation job ID.

tools.name: sfdt_rollback
tools.description: Roll back the last successful deployment using org backup snapshots.

tools.name: sfdt_audit
tools.description: Run read-only org health diagnostics (suspicious setup audit trail, license usage, MFA coverage, unused Apex classes, inactive users, deprecated API versions, inactive flows, unused permission sets, connected apps, missing field descriptions, unreferenced Apex, object access lint). Returns a normalised snapshot of check results.

tools.name: sfdt_monitor
tools.description: Run org monitoring checks (org limit consumption, recent Apex job failures, security health-check score, org info, recent deployment health, legacy API usage, paused flow interviews) and optionally a full metadata backup. Returns a normalised snapshot of check results.

tools.name: sfdt_retrofit
tools.description: Retrofit metadata from a source org to a target org: retrieve specified metadata types, commit, then smart-deploy. Validate-only unless execute=true.

tools.name: sfdt_pr_comment
tools.description: Post the latest audit or monitor snapshot to the current pull request as a markdown comment (via the gh CLI).

tools.name: sfdt_notify
tools.description: Send the latest audit or monitor snapshot to configured notification channels (Slack/Teams/Google Chat/email/webhook), applying each channel's event filter and severity threshold. Run an audit/monitor first so a snapshot exists.

tools.name: sfdt_docs
tools.description: Generate MkDocs-compatible project documentation (custom objects + fields, Apex classes, Flows) with an optional AI overview and a Mermaid ER diagram of the data model.

tools.name: sfdt_coverage
tools.description: Report Apex code coverage for a Salesforce org — org-wide percentage plus per-class coverage. Read-only.

tools.name: sfdt_scan
tools.description: Fetch the complete metadata inventory of a Salesforce org (all component types and members). Read-only.

tools.name: sfdt_dependencies
tools.description: Show the metadata dependencies of a component — what it references and what references it. Read-only.

tools.name: sfdt_flow_scan
tools.description: Analyze a Salesforce org's Flows for quality issues and anti-patterns (via @sfdt/flow-core) — lists FlowDefinitions and fetches each active version from the org, then runs the health checks. Returns the flow-scan report. Read-only.

tools.name: sfdt_release
tools.description: Build a release: generate the release manifest (package.xml) and release notes for a package. Writes release artifacts to the repo. Mutating — requires confirmExecution.

tools.name: sfdt_scratch_create
tools.description: Create a Salesforce scratch org. Mutating (consumes a DevHub scratch-org allocation) — requires confirmExecution.

tools.name: sfdt_scratch_delete
tools.description: Delete a scratch org by alias or username. Destructive — requires confirmExecution.

tools.name: sfdt_scratch_pool
tools.description: Inspect or top up the scratch-org pool. action="status" is read-only; action="fill" creates orgs to reach the target size and requires confirmExecution.

tools.name: sfdt_data_export
tools.description: Export a configured data set from the org to local files. Reads from the org and writes local data files (read-only with respect to the org).

tools.name: sfdt_data_import
tools.description: Import a configured data set into the org. Mutating (writes records) — requires confirmExecution.

tools.name: sfdt_data_delete
tools.description: Bulk-delete a configured data set in the org. Destructive — requires confirmExecution.

tools.name: sfdt_test
tools.description: Run Apex tests via the enhanced test runner. Optionally limit to specific test classes. Consumes org test resources; not metadata-mutating.

tools.name: sfdt_history
tools.description: Show recent sfdt run history (audit, monitor, quality, test, deploy, agent-test, …) from the local run index — trend org-health, test, and deploy outcomes over time. Read-only.

tools.name: sfdt_get_parked_result
tools.description: Retrieve the full payload of a previously parked tool result.
